/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/src/benchmark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/src/parse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/src/sw/sw_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/src/sw/sw_optimised.cu.o CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/src/nw/nw_cpu.cpp.o -o benchmark   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
